ResourceHeader.ResourceName: GOES 13 Magnetospheric Electron Detector (MAGED) data with energy from 30 to 50 keV at 2 s Time Resolution in Spacecraft Coordinates
ResourceHeader.Description: The GOES 13 Magnetospheric Electron Detector (MAGED) are essentially the same as the Energetic Particle Sensor (EPS) on GOES 8-12. For more information, please see Onsager et al. 1996, Operational uses of the GOES energetic particle detectors, in GOES 8 and Beyond, Proc. SPIE, Vol. 2812, edited by E. R. Washwell, pp. 281-290, Bellingham, WA. These data file contain mainly information on the electron count rates and fluxes from 30 to 50 keV. Data files contain long descriptive header.
ResourceHeader.Acknowledgement: NASA Office of Space Science Applications (United States), NOAA National Environmental Satellite Service (United States), Terry G. Onsager

InformationURL.Name: GOES N, O, and P Brochure
InformationURL.Description: Information about the magnetometers onboard GOES 13

AccessURL.Name: Direct access to the GOES 13 Magnetospheric Electron Detector (MAGED) data
AccessURL.Description: Direct link to the GOES 13 Magnetospheric Electron Detector (MAGED) data in CSV format as well as the energetic particle data from other GOES spacecraft. The data are sorted by year, month, spacecraft, and file type. The file names indicates the data type, spacecraft number, year, month, and resolution. For example, g13_maged_19me1_2s_20110617_20110617.csv, indicates GOES 13 magnetometer data at 2 s time resolution for 2011-06-17.

TimeSpan.Note: Time format in data files is year-month-day hour:minute:seconds. Data file may fill out the first month and last month with flags.

Parameter.Name: Seconds of the Month
Parameter.Description: Time format in data files is year-month-day hour:minute:seconds.

Parameter.Name: Quality flag for electrons with energy from 30 to 50 keV
Parameter.Description: Quality flag non-zero value indicates data quality issue.

Parameter.Name: Uncorrected Count rate of electrons with energy from 30 to 50 keV
Parameter.Description: Average count rate of electrons with energy from 30 to 50 keV measured by telescope 1 not corrected for dead time errors or other sources of contamination.

Parameter.Name: Corrected Count rate of electrons with energy from 30 to 50 keV
Parameter.Description: Average count rate of electrons with energy from 30 to 50 keV measured by telescope 1 corrected for dead time errors but not other sources of contamination

Parameter.Name: Average flux of electrons with energy from 30 to 50 keV
Parameter.Description: Average flux of 40 keV electrons measured by telescope 1 corrected for dead time errors but not other sources of contamination.

Parameter.Name: Quality flag for electrons with energy from 30 to 50 keV
Parameter.Description: Quality flag non-zero value indicates data quality issue.

Parameter.Name: Uncorrected Count rate of electrons with energy from 30 to 50 keV
Parameter.Description: Average count rate of electrons with energy from 30 to 50 keV measured by telescope 2 not corrected for dead time errors or other sources of contamination.

Parameter.Name: Corrected Count rate of electrons with energy from 30 to 50 keV
Parameter.Description: Average count rate of electrons with energy from 30 to 50 keV measured by telescope 2 corrected for dead time errors but not other sources of contamination

Parameter.Name: Average flux of electrons with energy from 30 to 50 keV
Parameter.Description: Average flux of 40 keV electrons measured by telescope 1 corrected for dead time errors but not other sources of contamination.

Parameter.Name: Quality flag for electrons with energy from 30 to 50 keV
Parameter.Description: Quality flag non-zero value indicates data quality issue.

Parameter.Name: Uncorrected Count rate of electrons with energy from 30 to 50 keV
Parameter.Description: Average count rate of electrons with energy from 30 to 50 keV measured by telescope 3 not corrected for dead time errors or other sources of contamination.

Parameter.Name: Corrected Count rate of electrons with energy from 30 to 50 keV
Parameter.Description: Average count rate of electrons with energy from 30 to 50 keV measured by telescope 3 corrected for dead time errors but not other sources of contamination

Parameter.Name: Average flux of electrons with energy from 30 to 50 keV
Parameter.Description: Average flux of 40 keV electrons measured by telescope 3 corrected for dead time errors but not other sources of contamination.

Parameter.Name: Quality flag for electrons with energy from 30 to 50 keV
Parameter.Description: Quality flag non-zero value indicates data quality issue.

Parameter.Name: Uncorrected Count rate of electrons with energy from 30 to 50 keV
Parameter.Description: Average count rate of electrons with energy from 30 to 50 keV measured by telescope 4 not corrected for dead time errors or other sources of contamination.

Parameter.Name: Corrected Count rate of electrons with energy from 30 to 50 keV
Parameter.Description: Average count rate of electrons with energy from 30 to 50 keV measured by telescope 4 corrected for dead time errors but not other sources of contamination

Parameter.Name: Average flux of electrons with energy from 30 to 50 keV
Parameter.Description: Average flux of 40 keV electrons measured by telescope 4 corrected for dead time errors but not other sources of contamination.

Parameter.Name: Quality flag for electrons with energy from 30 to 50 keV
Parameter.Description: Quality flag non-zero value indicates data quality issue.

Parameter.Name: Uncorrected Count rate of electrons with energy from 30 to 50 keV
Parameter.Description: Average count rate of electrons with energy from 30 to 50 keV measured by telescope 5 not corrected for dead time errors or other sources of contamination.

Parameter.Name: Corrected Count rate of electrons with energy from 30 to 50 keV
Parameter.Description: Average count rate of electrons with energy from 30 to 50 keV measured by telescope 5 corrected for dead time errors but not other sources of contamination

Parameter.Name: Average flux of electrons with energy from 30 to 50 keV
Parameter.Description: Average flux of 40 keV electrons measured by telescope 5 corrected for dead time errors but not other sources of contamination.

Parameter.Name: Quality flag for electrons with energy from 30 to 50 keV
Parameter.Description: Quality flag non-zero value indicates data quality issue.

Parameter.Name: Uncorrected Count rate of electrons with energy from 30 to 50 keV
Parameter.Description: Average count rate of electrons with energy from 30 to 50 keV measured by telescope 6 not corrected for dead time errors or other sources of contamination.

Parameter.Name: Corrected Count rate of electrons with energy from 30 to 50 keV
Parameter.Description: Average count rate of electrons with energy from 30 to 50 keV measured by telescope 6 corrected for dead time errors but not other sources of contamination

Parameter.Name: Average flux of electrons with energy from 30 to 50 keV
Parameter.Description: Average flux of 40 keV electrons measured by telescope 6 corrected for dead time errors but not other sources of contamination.
